tools.name: about_mkliniki
tools.description: What M-Kliniki is, the services it offers in Kenya, and how its escrow payments work. Call this to describe M-Kliniki accurately to a user.

tools.name: find_doctor
tools.description: Find real, verified doctors in Kenya available for a video consultation, optionally by specialty. Returns names, specialties and fees (no contact details).

tools.name: find_medicine
tools.description: Search pharmacy items that do not need a prescription, available for delivery in Kenya. Prescription medicines are never returned here.

tools.name: find_groceries
tools.description: Search fresh groceries available for delivery in Kenya (Dishi Fiti, food as medicine).

tools.name: join_mkliniki
tools.description: How to JOIN M-Kliniki. Use this when the user is a LICENSED PROVIDER (doctor, pharmacy, laboratory), a grocer or shop, a delivery rider, an ambulance, or a partner or investor wanting to reach more customers in Kenya and get paid automatically, or a patient or buyer who wants to start.
